chat.spectator_unlock: Spectator chat unlocks when the game ends.
chat.peer_unavailable: Messaging is unavailable for this account
chat.self_dm_unsupported: Direct messages to yourself are not supported.
chat.players_chat_only: Only players can view the players chat.
chat.subscription_rate_limited: Too many chat subscription attempts. Please wait and try again.
chat.delivery_unknown: Message delivery could not be confirmed.
chat.connection_unavailable: The connection is not open. Please try again.
chat.send_rate_limited: Too many messages. Please wait and try again.
chat.dm_send_restricted: You cannot send messages to this user.
chat.players_send_restricted: Only players can send messages here.
chat.spectator_send_restricted: Players cannot send to spectator chat while the game is ongoing.
chat.client_id_conflict: This retry conflicts with the original delivery. Send it as a new message.
chat.empty_body: Send a message to start the conversation.

block_dialog.title: Block this user?
block_dialog.body: They will no longer be able to send you direct messages. In game and tournament chats, their messages will be hidden by default (you can click to reveal). You can unblock them later from their profile or from Messages.

page.title: Messages
page.choose_conversation: Choose a chat from the sidebar to start messaging.
